releases.author: daedalus-mb
releases.description:
## What's new

**Intra-vault mapping** — mirror a hidden vault folder (e.g. \`.claude\`, which Obsidian Sync skips) to a visible vault path so it rides Obsidian Sync and stays identical across all devices.

### How to enable

1. Open Local Sync settings → **Add mapping**
2. Toggle **Intra-vault mapping** on
3. Set **Source vault path** to the hidden folder (e.g. \`.claude\`)
4. Set **Obsidian folder** to the visible target (e.g. \`AI_workspace\`)
5. Click **Add mapping**

Sync direction defaults to hidden → visible (one-way).

### Full changelog

- feat: intra-vault mapping support (source + target both inside vault)
- Mapping modal: contextual labels when intra-vault mode is active
- Validation: guard against same-path source/target
- mtime preservation prevents sync loops

Fixes https://github.com/entire-vc/evc-local-sync-plugin/issues/14
releases.name: v1.3.0 — Intra-vault mapping

releases.author: daedalus-mb
releases.description:
## What changed

### P0 — Critical risk fix
- Raised `minAppVersion` from `1.4.0` → `1.6.6` to match `FileManager.trashFile` API requirement
  Closes both scorecard critical-risk flags (2 use-sites). Users on Obsidian ≥ 1.6.6 are unaffected.

### P1 — Scorecard codemod (warnings cleanup)
- `createEl("span")` / `createEl("div")` → `createSpan()` / `createDiv()` shorthands (~30 call-sites across modals and settings)
- `document.createElement` / `document.body` → `activeDocument.*` (export/download links)
- `setTimeout` / `clearTimeout` → `activeWindow.setTimeout/clearTimeout` (status-bar)
- `setInterval` / `clearInterval` → `activeWindow.setInterval/clearInterval` (scheduled sync)
- Removed `builtin-modules` devDependency; replaced with Node.js built-in `builtinModules` from `node:module`
- Unused `detectDeletions` params prefixed `_` to satisfy no-unused-vars rule
- `NodeJS.Timeout` interval/timeout handles typed as `number` (browser/activeWindow compatible)

### Refactoring
- `expandHome()` utility extracted to `src/path-utils.ts`; applied consistently across mapping-manager, file-watcher, settings, and sync-engine
releases.name: 1.2.0 — scorecard cleanup

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
## What is Changed

### Bug Fixes
- Case-insensitive path sync on macOS/Windows - Fixed sync engine treating gtm/ and GTM/ as different folders on case-insensitive filesystems
- Obsidian eslint scan compliance - Resolved all issues flagged by ObsidianReviewBot
- Async file operations in sync-state-manager

### Improvements
- Added issue form links to settings page
- Folder picker for Obsidian path in mapping modal
- Pill-shaped button design for settings UI

Full Changelog: https://github.com/entire-vc/evc-local-sync-plugin/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
## What's New in v1.0.1

### File Deletion Tracking (FR-060)
- **Sync deletions** — When a file is deleted in one location, it can now be automatically deleted in the other
- New settings: `Sync deletions` and `Confirm deletions`
- Deletions shown in dry-run preview with warning styling
- Backup created before deletion (if backups enabled)
- First sync after enabling never deletes (safety measure)

### Per-mapping Conflict Resolution (FR-061)
- Override global conflict resolution strategy per project
- Use case: "always-ask" for work projects, "newer-wins" for personal notes
- Settings indicator (⚙) shows which mappings have custom settings

### Per-mapping File Types (FR-062)
- Override global file types and exclude patterns per project
- Use case: sync only `.md` for docs project, include `.canvas` for visual projects

### UI Improvements
- New "Advanced settings" collapsible section in mapping editor
- Deletion preview in dry-run modal
- Custom settings tooltip on hover

## Installation

### Manual Installation
1. Download `evc-local-sync-1.0.1.zip`
2. Extract to `.obsidian/plugins/evc-local-sync/`
3. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin

### BRAT
Add `entire-vc/evc-local-sync-plugin` to BRAT

## Files
- `main.js` — Plugin code
- `styles.css` — Styles
- `manifest.json` — Plugin manifest
- `evc-local-sync-1.0.1.zip` — Complete plugin archive
releases.name: v1.0.1 - File Deletion Tracking & Per-mapping Settings

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
## EVC Local Sync to AI Agent - Initial Release

Obsidian plugin for bidirectional synchronization of documentation between Obsidian vault and AI development projects.

### Features

- **Bidirectional sync** between AI projects and Obsidian vault
- **Multiple sync modes**: Manual, on-change, on-startup, scheduled
- **Conflict resolution**: Newer wins, AI wins, Obsidian wins, Always ask
- **Dry-run preview** mode
- **File watching** with configurable debounce
- **Symlink support**
- **Backup creation** and cleanup
- **Import/Export** configuration
- **Detailed logging** with CSV export
- **Status bar** and **ribbon icon**
- Support for `.md`, `.canvas`, `.excalidraw.md` files

### Installation

#### BRAT (Recommended for beta)
1. Install BRAT plugin
2. Add beta plugin: `entire-vc/evc-local-sync-plugin`

#### Manual
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this release
2. Create folder `.obsidian/plugins/evc-local-sync/` in your vault
3. Copy files to this folder
4. Enable in Settings → Community Plugins

### Compatibility

- Obsidian 1.4.0+
- macOS, Windows, Linux
releases.name: v1.0.0 - Initial Release
